description: SPEC §7.3 / conformance §14.8. In deferred mode, rejecting a parent via `bl update <id> status=in_progress` must additionally close the auto-opened forge-gate child in the same state-branch commit (or refuse if it cannot be closed atomically). Invariant: a task is in_progress iff no open gate child exists. bl-b017 [bl-b017] delivered the forward review path only; its acceptance list does not cover reject, so the gate child is currently orphaned (left open) on a deferred-mode rejection, and the parent keeps a dangling gates link. WHY tracked separately: bl-b017 was scoped to 'push branch, auto-open gate'; the reject leg is a distinct primitive and was deliberately not in its acceptance. The work branch on origin is left alone on reject (operator/forge closes the PR if abandoning).
title: Deferred-mode reject path: close gate child atomically
